dataset_name: AI Factory Incident Triage Dataset V2
description: Synthetic multi-source AI factory incidents for evaluating an AI Data Center Operations Copilot.
assumption: Events are assumed to be already collected from BMS, DCIM, GPU telemetry, network monitoring, power systems, storage, workload telemetry, security, and environmental systems.

ground_truth.root_cause: Hot aisle containment door left open causing local airflow imbalance
ground_truth.recommended_action: Send on-site operator to close containment door and verify rack inlet temperatures normalize.
ground_truth.business_impact: Potential localized hotspot if door remains open.

ground_truth.root_cause: InfiniBand fabric packet loss causing NCCL communication slowdown
ground_truth.recommended_action: Inspect affected InfiniBand switch ports, optics, and reroute training jobs if needed.
ground_truth.business_impact: Distributed training jobs may miss completion deadline.

ground_truth.root_cause: CDU coolant flow degradation causing GPU thermal throttling
ground_truth.recommended_action: Inspect CDU flow rate, coolant pressure, and drain affected GPU workloads if temperature continues rising.
ground_truth.business_impact: Training throughput degradation and possible workload interruption.

ground_truth.root_cause: Hot aisle containment door left open causing local airflow imbalance
ground_truth.recommended_action: Send on-site operator to close containment door and verify rack inlet temperatures normalize.
ground_truth.business_impact: Potential localized hotspot if door remains open.

ground_truth.root_cause: UPS battery degradation reducing runtime for critical racks
ground_truth.recommended_action: Verify UPS battery string health and move critical load to redundant power path.
ground_truth.business_impact: Reduced power protection and risk of rack shutdown during utility instability.

ground_truth.root_cause: InfiniBand fabric packet loss causing NCCL communication slowdown
ground_truth.recommended_action: Inspect affected InfiniBand switch ports, optics, and reroute training jobs if needed.
ground_truth.business_impact: Distributed training jobs may miss completion deadline.

ground_truth.recommended_action: Verify UPS battery string health and move critical load to redundant power path.
ground_truth.business_impact: Reduced power protection and risk of rack shutdown during utility instability.

ground_truth.business_impact: Training throughput degradation and possible workload interruption.

ground_truth.root_cause: Humidity drift outside preferred operating envelope
ground_truth.recommended_action: Verify room humidity control and monitor trend for the next 30 minutes.
ground_truth.business_impact: No immediate business impact, but increased environmental risk if trend continues.

ground_truth.root_cause: Storage latency spike delaying model checkpoints
ground_truth.recommended_action: Check storage pool latency, queue depth, and NVMe health before next checkpoint cycle.
ground_truth.business_impact: Training jobs may slow down but immediate service impact is limited.
